name: MSSP - OS - MS - 22 - H - Successful Logon with Administrative or Special privileges during Non-Business Hour- Business days(whitelisting required)
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event matches Event ID is any of 4672
when the event(s) occur between 18:00 and 08:00
when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY MSSP - OS - MS - 22 - H - Successful Logon with Administrative or Special privileges during Non-Business Hour- Business days(whitelisting required) on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event matches Event ID is any of 4672
AND when the event(s) occur between 18:00 and 08:00
AND when at least 1 events are seen with the same Account Name (custom) in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Successful Logon with Administrative or Special privileges during Non-Business Hour
